subcodes.first_line: The photograph whereof thou didst write is not the likeness of the Blessed Beauty, but rather the photograph of Jinab-i-Kalím [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آن عکس که مرقوم نموده اید عکس جمال مبارک نیست آن عکس جناب کلیم
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @martyrs and martyrdom, @promotion of commerce and industry
